title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 354.265 - Nonrenewable temporary license issued, when
text:
354.265.  Nonrenewable temporary license issued, when. — A nonrenewable temporary license may be issued for a period not to exceed ninety days in cases where an applicant has theretofore filed a completed application for a license, has secured an appointment by a corporation subject to the provisions of sections 354.010 to 354.380, has paid the applicable fees and where the director is satisfied as to the applicant's business reputation.
(L. 1983 H.B. 127)
